mapper.insert: INSERT INTO club_apply( club_id, user_id, apply_message, status, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{clubId}, #{userId}, #{applyMessage}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.select: SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id, ca.user_id, ca.apply_message, ca.status, ca.create_time, ca.update_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM club_apply ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE ca.id = #{applyId}

SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id, ca.user_id, ca.apply_message, ca.status, ca.create_time, ca.update_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM club_apply ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE ca.club_id = #{clubId} AND ca.status = 0 ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC

SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id, ca.user_id, ca.apply_message, ca.status, ca.create_time, ca.update_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM club_apply ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE ca.club_id = #{clubId} AND ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 0 LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE club_apply SET status = #{status}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{applyId}
mapper.select: SELECT ca.id, ca.club_id, ca.user_id, ca.apply_message, ca.status, ca.create_time, ca.update_time, u.username, u.nickname, u.avatar FROM club_apply ca LEFT JOIN user u ON ca.user_id = u.id WHERE ca.user_id = #{userId} AND ca.status = 0 ORDER BY ca.create_time DESC LIMIT 1
